hero.title: Radiant Waves Media Morning Global News
hero.description: Friday, July 10, 2026. Good morning. Here are today's verified global headlines, FIFA World Cup quarter-final updates, business, politics and security news from around the world.

breaking: 🔴 France defeat Morocco 2-0 to reach the FIFA World Cup semi-finals
🔴 Kylian Mbappe joins Lionel Messi on eight goals in the Golden Boot race
🔴 Spain face Belgium today for a place in the World Cup semi-finals
🔴 Global leaders continue monitoring security developments in the Middle East
🔴 Europe remains under heatwave alerts as temperatures stay exceptionally high
🔴 Nigeria sustains nationwide security operations against terrorism and kidnapping
🔴 Global markets focus on inflation, oil prices and central bank policies
🔴 Artificial intelligence investment continues expanding across major economies

featured.title: France March Into World Cup Semi-Finals
featured.content: France defeated Morocco 2-0 in Boston to qualify for the FIFA World Cup semi-finals. Didier Deschamps' side produced another disciplined display, with Ousmane Dembele among the standout performers. France will now face the winner of Spain versus Belgium as they continue their quest for another world title.

articles.title: France Eliminate Morocco
articles.description: France secured a 2-0 victory over Morocco to book a place in the FIFA World Cup semi-finals. Coach Didier Deschamps praised his team's discipline and belief after another commanding performance.

articles.title: Dembele Continues Outstanding Tournament
articles.description: Ousmane Dembele delivered another influential performance as France advanced. His creativity and attacking threat continue to make him one of the standout players of the tournament.

articles.title: Mbappe Joins Golden Boot Leaders
articles.description: Kylian Mbappe scored his eighth goal of the tournament to draw level with Lionel Messi in the race for the FIFA World Cup Golden Boot.

articles.title: Today's Quarter-Final Fixture
articles.description: Spain meet Belgium in one of the tournament's biggest quarter-final clashes, with the winner earning a semi-final meeting against France.

articles.title: World Cup Semi-Final Picture Takes Shape
articles.description: France have secured their place in the last four, while the remaining quarter-finals continue to determine the final semi-final line-up.

articles.title: Middle East Diplomacy Continues
articles.description: International diplomatic engagement remains focused on regional stability, humanitarian assistance and efforts to reduce tensions.

articles.title: Heatwave Persists Across Europe
articles.description: Several European countries remain under heat alerts as exceptionally high temperatures continue to increase wildfire risks and pressure on public health services.

articles.title: United States Continues Hosting World Cup
articles.description: Host cities across the United States continue welcoming supporters from around the world as the FIFA World Cup reaches the decisive quarter-final stage.

articles.title: Asia Expands High-Tech Investment
articles.description: Governments and technology companies across Asia continue investing in artificial intelligence, semiconductor production and digital infrastructure.

articles.title: Nigeria Sustains Security Operations
articles.description: Security agencies continue coordinated operations against insurgents, bandits and kidnapping gangs while authorities reaffirm commitments to improving national security.

articles.title: Economic Reform Remains A National Priority
articles.description: Inflation, infrastructure development, electricity supply, agriculture and investment remain central to Nigeria's economic agenda.

articles.title: African Trade Integration Advances
articles.description: African countries continue expanding regional trade and infrastructure partnerships under the African Continental Free Trade Area.

articles.title: Markets Watch Inflation And Oil Prices
articles.description: Global investors continue monitoring inflation data, central bank decisions and energy prices as markets assess the outlook for economic growth.

articles.title: Artificial Intelligence Investment Accelerates
articles.description: Technology companies worldwide continue increasing investment in AI, cloud computing, robotics and cybersecurity.

articles.title: Global Leaders Focus On Security And Growth
articles.description: Governments around the world continue balancing economic growth, national security and international cooperation amid evolving geopolitical challenges.

Kylian Mbappe joined Lionel Messi on eight goals in the Golden Boot race.
Spain face Belgium today in the remaining quarter-final.
Europe continues experiencing an intense heatwave.
